description: This is a false-colour satellite image, likely using a 4/1/3 Band Combination, displaying land cover in the north-west of Spain, sourced from LUCAS 2012. The image highlights two land parcels with light blue boundaries, labelled with numerical codes. The larger parcel, labelled "3220", shows a dark reddish-brown area representing a "Highly Artificial Coniferous Plantation" (pine), consistent with monoculture vegetation in this band combination. Adjacent to this, a smaller parcel, labelled "1120", appears as a greenish area containing a structure, indicating an artificial surface or settlement. Yellow lines delineate broader land parcel boundaries.
